name: The Academy's Sashimi Sword Master RPG
description:
The Academy's Sashimi Sword Master RPG!

You are going to take the test to the Arcblade Academy of Blessing M.

The Exam
--------------------
The Exam is a survival game, is based on who survives the most, in the Subspace, any type of attacks are allowed.

The Subspace
------------------
The Subspace is a distinct plane created by the Academy, anything happens inside, (including death) their effects dissappear and the person returns to their form before they entered the Subspace.

CHARACTERS ADDED:
-------------------------------

Chloe Auditore
Abel von Nibelung
Blade Emperor Magnus
.. And other characters that are randomly generated!





TAGS:
||Magical, Blessing, Academy, Sword, RPG, Fantasy, Exam, School, Narrator||
